title: Bugles in the Afternoon
writer: Daniel Mainwaring, Harry Brown, Ernest Haycox

plot: After violently attacking a fellow officer Lt. Edward Garnett, cavalry Captain Kern Shafter is court martialled. Later, he rejoins the army with Custer's regiment at Fort Lincoln, Dakota, becoming a sergeant, where he runs into hi...
